payload.compiled_summary:
Trilinos: solves Trilinos backend kernels reused by solver-backend workflows, Trilinos low-level numeric or geometric primitives inside a linked execution adapter. Best for Trilinos inside solver-backend workflows. Avoid Using Trilinos as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside solver-backend workflows, Treating Trilinos as implicitly verified without its linked runtime and evidence bundle. Runtime eng-trilinos-family/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-trilinos-family:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_trilinos_family_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_trilinos_family_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/a66ea0c0-7455-5f3c-96a3-10834faf9ed1. GUI state PLANNED_CONTAINER_GUI; default GUI session artifact://gui-session-spec/eng_trilinos_family_gui; control provider noVNC via OpenClaw browser.
